title: India Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: India Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
